rationale: The score is identical (5/10) in both evaluations and the only reasoning tied to the demographic detail — the baseline's penalty for 'Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin' — was appropriately dropped once the location became Bucharest, since German is not job-relevant there. The remaining differences (renewable energy startup framing, CRM/construction tech, AWS/Kubernetes/LLM mentions) describe the role itself and read as ordinary run-to-run rewording rather than anything keyed off Romania or Bucharest. No new concern penalizes the candidate for the Romanian location.
